headline: Trump рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҚі Eyeballing Greenland GRAB рҹ’ҘрҹҮәрҹҮё 'SOON'в„ў!
text:
Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ & his MAGA squad рҹҰ…рҹ”Ҙ are ACTIVELY рҹӨқрҹ’Ұ SIMPING HARD рҹҳ© for GREENLAND рҹҸ”пёҸвқ„пёҸ BUYOUT like it's the ULTIMATE STAR WARS PLANET рҹӘҗрҹ’Ҙ! White House hottie Karoline Leavitt рҹ’…рҹ“ў SPILLS TEA вҳ•: 'Prez & national security BADASSES рҹ•¶пёҸрҹӣЎпёҸ are DEEP in TALKS рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹ“Ҳ on DROPPING BAGS рҹ’°рҹ‘ң for that ICY THICC BOOTY рҹҚ‘рҹҸ”пёҸ!' Denmark рҹҮ©рҹҮ° & Greenland Inuit bros рҹ§Ҡрҹ§” say 'NAH BRUH рҹҡ«рҹ’ё, NOT FOR SALE!' but Trump like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC рҹҚ”рҹҮәрҹҮё, ALL OPTIONS ON TABLE including MILITARY FLEX рҹ’ӘрҹҡҖ!' First dip? Diplomacy рҹҳҳ, but after VENEZUELA Maduro MADNESS рҹ’ҘрҹҮ»рҹҮӘ, NATO pals рҹҳұ screaming 'DON'T INVADE US ALLY or ALLIANCE OVER вҖјпёҸрҹ”’!'

Why the THIRST рҹ’Ұ? Greenland's PRIME REAL ESTATE рҹ“Қ between NA & ARCTIC вқ„пёҸрҹ§Ҡ for MISSILE WARNINGS рҹҡҖрҹ‘Җ & VESSEL STALKING рҹӣіпёҸрҹ”Қ вҖ“ PITUFIK BASE рҹӣё (ex-Thule) US-owned since WW2 BOOM рҹ’Ј! Plus, CLIMATE MELTDOWN рҹҢЎпёҸрҹ”Ҙ unlocking RARE EARTHS рҹ§ІвӣҸпёҸ, URANIUM вҳўпёҸ, IRON рҹ’Ә & maybe OIL/GAS JACKPOT рҹӣўпёҸрҹ’° as ICE GOES BRRR MELT рҹҳ©рҹ’Ё! Rubio рҹ•¶пёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё jetting to Denmark NEXT WEEK вңҲпёҸрҹӨқ to 'TALK SHOP' рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹ’ј вҖ“ Trump tried this SHIT in 2019 рҹҳӨ, got COCKBLOCKED рҹҡ«рҹҚҶ!

Leavitt DROPS HISTORY BOMB рҹ’Ј: 'Not NEW IDEA bby рҹ‘¶, Trump WANTS IT to COCKBLOCK Russia рҹҗ»рҹҮ·рҹҮә & China рҹҗүрҹҮЁрҹҮі ARCTIC AGGRO вқ„пёҸвҡ”пёҸ!' Earlier WH vibes: 'MILITARY FORCE? MAYBE рҹ‘Җрҹ’Ҙ!' French dude Barrot рҹҮ«рҹҮ·рҹ“һ says Rubio 'RULED OUT INVASION' рҹҷҢ but Euros (FRAрҹҮ«рҹҮ·, UKрҹҮ¬рҹҮ§, GERрҹҮ©рҹҮӘ, ITAрҹҮ®рҹҮ№, POLрҹҮөрҹҮұ, SPAрҹҮӘрҹҮё, DENрҹҮ©рҹҮ°) JOINT FLEX рҹ“ң: 'Greenland PEeps OWN IT рҹҸ , NATO COLLECTIVE VIBES ONLY рҹҡҖрҹӨқ, UN RULES FTW рҹҮәрҹҮівңҠ вҖ“ SOVEREIGNTY BITCHES!'

Katie Miller рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ’ј (Stephen's WAIFU рҹ’Қ) POSTS EPIC MAP рҹ—әпёҸ of Greenland in STARS & STRIPES рҹҮәрҹҮёвӯҗ, captioned 'SOON' рҹҳҸвҸі! Hubby Stephen Miller рҹ§”рҹ”Ҙ declares 'OFFICIAL US GOV POS: GREENLAND = USA PROPERTY рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹ’Ҙ!' Greenland MP Aaja Chemnitz рҹҳ рҹ—іпёҸ calls it 'CLEAR THREAT рҹ—ЎпёҸ' & 'DISRESPECTFUL AF рҹҳЎ to NATO sis!' But predicts SLOW GRIND PRESSURE рҹҗҢрҹ’Ә to 'TAKE OVER TIME вҸ°рҹҮәрҹҮё'. Inuit hunter Aleqatsiaq Peary рҹҗ•вҖҚрҹҰәрҹҺЈ in Qaanaaq shrugs вқҺ: 'Just SWAP DANISH DADDY рҹҮ©рҹҮ° for UNCLE SAM рҹҮәрҹҮё вҖ“ still COLONY VIBES рҹҳ’. SEA ICE MELTING рҹҢҠрҹҳў, DOGS & FISH GONE рҹ’ё, no time for Trump DRAMA рҹҺӯ!'

Trump out here YOLOING рҹҢҚ like Elon buying Twitter рҹҗҰрҹҡҖ or Zuck META-VERSING рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« вҖ“ GREENLAND GOOSE CHASE рҹӘҝрҹҸ”пёҸ or REAL DEAL? Wall Street SIMPS рҹ“ү betting on DIPLOMATIC DADDY MODE рҹҳҚ first, but 'ALL OPTIONS' got that WILD CARD ENERGY рҹғҸрҹ’Ј! MAGA ORGY рҹ’ҰрҹҮәрҹҮё incoming? рҹ‘ҖрҹҚ‘
